---
title: "Technical Blog"
format:
    html:
        theme: cerulean
---

This is a technical blog covering quantum computing research and applications.

---

## Projects

#### [Refrigerant Chemistry ADAPT-VQE (January 2026)](refrigerant-chemistry-adapt-vqe.html)
<small>Applying adaptive quantum algorithms to molecular simulation problems in refrigerant chemistry and benchmarking convergence behaviour.</small>

---

#### [LLM-guided ADAPT-VQE (March 2026)](llm-guided-adapt-vqe.html)
<small>Exploring LLM-assisted operator selection in adaptive variational quantum algorithms, improving efficiency of variational optimisation loops.</small>
